name: MCTS for Materials
description: Monte Carlo Tree Search framework for inverse design of correlated quantum materials, built with the MACE-MP-0 ML potential as a DFT surrogate. Developed at Los Alamos National Laboratory.

name: ChIMES-LSQ GPU Acceleration
description: GPU-accelerated least-squares fitting for training ChIMES machine-learned interatomic potentials.

name: ChIMES Calculator GPU Acceleration
description: GPU-accelerated force and energy evaluation for ChIMES molecular dynamics simulations.

name: ChIMES GPU Acceleration Benchmark Study
description: Benchmarking study quantifying speedups from GPU-accelerated ChIMES training and molecular dynamics.

name: D-Optimal Active Learning for ChIMES UQ
description: D-optimality-based active learning driver for uncertainty quantification within ChIMES interatomic potential training.

name: ChIMES Multielement Fingerprint Analysis
description: Extending cluster-graph fingerprinting to multielement systems for analyzing ML-IAP training and simulation data.
